title: mesosphaerum eriophyllum
intro: Mesosphaerum eriophyllum, also known as False Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and flatulence, as well as its potential to aid in reducing fever and relieving respiratory problems. Mesosphaerum eriophyllum can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or essential oil extraction, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
